question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/repository/NftAllowanceRepository.java -> Scope: '] [Function: findAll(NftAllowanceRequest, EntityId)] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the getMiddleCondition() logic where secondary bounds with EQ operators are included in the middle condition to craft a request where the secondary tokenIds bound uses EQ, causing the middle condition to include an additional token_id filter that was not intended by the primary account filter, potentially leaking cross-account data?
